docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONCADA, RUPERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONZON, EDWIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 621 ANDERSON STREET (FRONT ROOM, LEFT SIDE OF UNIT) SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONCADA, RUPERTO AS TO DEFENDANT MONZON, EDWIN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONCADA, RUPERTO SERVED JAN-02-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONZON, EDWIN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20. PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONCADA, RUPERTO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MONZON, EDWIN
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONCADA, RUPERTO AS TO DEFENDANT MONZON, EDWIN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MONZON, EDWIN
DECLARATION RE LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONCADA, RUPERTO
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON AUG-14-2025.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MONZON, EDWIN
